title: Error: wrong manifest type for disk artifact: text/html
body:
### Issue Description

(base) ➜  ~ podman info
OS: darwin/arm64
provider: applehv
version: 5.3.1

Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: Get "http://d/v5.3.1/libpod/_ping": dial unix /var/folders/wv/npwj5lks3q302zr6v3035yjh0000gn/T/storage-run-501/podman/podman.sock: connect: no such file or directory
(base) ➜  ~ podman machine init --rootful
Looking up Podman Machine image at quay.io/podman/machine-os:5.3 to create VM
Error: wrong manifest type for disk artifact: text/html
(base) ➜  ~ podman machine init
Looking up Podman Machine image at quay.io/podman/machine-os:5.3 to create VM
Error: wrong manifest type for disk artifact: text/html
(base) ➜  ~ podman version
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: Get "http://d/v5.3.1/libpod/_ping": dial unix /var/folders/wv/npwj5lks3q302zr6v3035yjh0000gn/T/storage-run-501/podman/podman.sock: connect: no such file or directory
(base) ➜  ~

comments.body:
Are behind a proxy or anything that messes with https traffic? 

If you can install skopeo what is the output of `skopeo inspect --raw docker://quay.io/podman/machine-os:5.3` on this system?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
